chapter.title: List of Pericopes
chapter.rubric: Capitula lectionum evangelii anni circuli ad missas
chapter.note: First folio severely damaged and repaired; text was transcribed onto front flyleaf iv

chapter.title: Prologues by Eusebius and Jerome
chapter.incipit: Eusebius carpiano patri (Eusebius) Beatissima papae damaso (Jerome)
chapter.note: Fols. 10r-v: Eusebius to Carpianus; fols. 10v-11v: Jerome letter to Pope Damasus
chapter.author: Eusebius
Jerome

chapter.title: Eusebian canon tables
chapter.note: Canons are of shorter Vulgate set; numbers grouped in sets of six
chapter.author: Eusebius

chapter.title: Gospels
chapter.note: Fols. 18r-19r: 74 chapter list for Matthew; fols. 20r-53r: Gospel of Matthew; fols. 53v-54r: Prologue to Mark; fols. 54r-55r: 13 chapter list for Mark; fols. 56r-80v: Gospel of Mark; fols. 80v-81r: Prologue to Luke; fols. 81r-85r: 20 chapter list for Luke; fol. 86r-120v: Gospel of Luke, with Luke 3.8-6.33 missing due to removed bifolia between fols. 90 and 91; fols. 120v-121r: Prologue to John; fol. 121r-v: 14 chapter list for John; fols. 123r-147v: Gospel of John
